channel.title: 2026 on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in 2026 on Gajab Jobs

item.title: SECL Grade C Various Post Online Form 2026
item.description: South Eastern Coalfields Limited (SECL) has released Recruitment 2026 notification for 1055+ posts of Mining Sirdar, Dy. Surveyor and Assistant Foreman. The online application will begin on 15 April 2026 and close on 14 May 2026. Candidates having 10th pass, Diploma or relevant technical qualifications are eligible to apply. The selection process includes a Computer Based Test (CBT). Selected candidates will get a salary of ₹47,330 per month. Both male and female candidates can apply for these government jobs.

item.title: NPCIL Executive Trainee Online Form 2026
item.description: NPCIL Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026 offers 330 ET posts under a prestigious Central Government PSU. Applicants must hold a BE/B.Tech degree with at least 60% marks along with a valid GATE 2024/2025/2026 score. The online application window is open from 10 April 2026 to 30 April 2026. The selection process includes shortlisting based on GATE score followed by a personal interview. During training, candidates will get a stipend of ₹74,000 per month and will be appointed as Scientific Officer/C after successful training completion.
